name: chr19_19p13_3_LILR_LAIR_xref
description: 19q13.42 LILR/LAIR leukocyte receptor cluster, the proximal partner of the broader leukocyte-receptor complex (LRC) that includes the KIR cluster. Contains LILRA1-6, LILRB1-5, LAIR1/2 paralogs as a tandem array at 80-95% identity; modulates NK / myeloid signaling.

architecture.internal_structure: ~11 LILR + 2 LAIR paralog genes in tandem at 80-95% identity over ~500 kb; SD blocks of 10-50 kb between paralogs; immediately centromeric to KIR — together forming the LRC.
